text: In this bright, clinical corridor with its angled glass and flashes of colored light, I feel a sense of curiosity and mild anticipation. The stark, orderly architecture contrasts with the warm purple glow emanating from the room ahead. My footing is a bit uncertain, as if I’m on the threshold of discovery—invited, but not yet fully belonging. There’s a quiet invitation to step in and see what lies beneath the surface, amidst the symbols of safety and the silence of waiting spaces.
